description: The Nuova Mala del Brenta is a mafia-type criminal organization based in the Veneto region of Italy, emerging in the late 1990s as a successor to the original Mala del Brenta. It is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering, and other crimes. The group is considered by Italian authorities to have all characteristics of a mafia organization under Article 416 bis-cp. It operates in Northeast Italy and has ties to Cosa Nostra and other Italian mafia groups.

country_links.evidence_quote: Maniero was a personal friend of the son of the former Croatian president Franjo Tuđman and was involved in the supply of guns to Croatia, in the early 1990s.
country_links.context: The organization supplied guns to Croatia in the early 1990s.

country_links.evidence_quote: Brenta mafiosi have colluded with Stidda members on a number of occasions involving a number of fraudulent scams at a Maltese casino in 2002.
country_links.context: Brenta mafiosi colluded with Stidda members in fraudulent scams at a Maltese casino.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Northeast Italy , Veneto , Friuli-Venezia Giulia , Emilia-Romagna ), Croatia , Slovenia
country_links.context: The Nuova Mala del Brenta has territory in Slovenia.

country_links.evidence_quote: heroin from Turkish drug baron Nvo Berisa, who helped a number of Venetian mobsters in hiding in Turkey
country_links.context: The organization bought heroin from a Turkish drug baron who helped Venetian mobsters hide in Turkey.
